name: UNKILLABLE ROBOTS
short_description: UNKILLABLE ROBOTS is an exciting game set in the distant future, where robots have taken over the whole world and are divided into two camps. Some robots strive to restore order and peace, while others crave destruction and chaos.
detailed_description:
UNKILLABLE ROBOTS is an exciting game set in the distant future, where robots have taken over the whole world and are divided into two camps. Some robots strive to restore order and peace, while others crave destruction and chaos. Your goal in this game is to restore the factories that are needed to restore the world. However, to do this you need to collect frost crystals, which are the key to restoring factories and saving the world from destruction.

The game is a 2D action roguelike. Where you need to move around the location and destroy enemies.

Explore a world full of dangers and mysteries, fight enemies and go through trials to get to the frost crystals. Weigh your decisions, as your choices will affect the course of events in the world of robots and the outcome of your adventure.
